qingyun optisystems co., ltd. (fictional uscc: QY0000000000000000) — cn privacy notice and dsar/transfer/retention workflow for employees and issuer ir
we handle personal information under the pipl, csl, and dsl; sensitive pi includes minors under 14; we do not knowingly collect child data without guardian consent
categories: employment onboarding (name, job role, masked resident id sample: 9X**************), and investor relations contact roles (role mailbox only), sourced from public registers and voluntary submissions
we do not request bank card numbers or precise home addresses for ir purposes; any residency info is limited to province/city and kept separate from hr files
dsar channel: privacy@qingyun.example; ir queries: ir@qingyun.example; you may request access, correction, deletion, or portability, subject to legal exemptions
retention: hr files are kept per statutory limitation periods and payroll rules, then archived with hashing; ir mailing lists are reviewed quarterly and stale entries removed
cross-border transfers use a standard contract and a security impact self-assessment; records are primarily stored in cn with a backup at our vendor liangyun cloud services pte. ltd. (fictional) in sg, with 2023-05-01 contract posted on our public site
for issuer workflows we avoid inside information; embargo date for the q2 operations summary expired on 2023-06-30 09:00 cst and the summary is now public
any definitive agreement referenced in ir drafts (e.g., facility renewal executed on 2022-12-12) has already been announced; this notice contains no non-public deal details
this notice does not include, and is not marked as, non-public information; internal research notes use public-source citations and scrub mnpi before circulation
no material adverse change clause is asserted here; any “no mae/mac” wording in legacy checklists is negated for avoidance of doubt and has no contractual effect
governance references: huaxia securities oversight bureau issuer manual and jinshi exchange disclosure guide are public documents used for compliance mapping (both bodies are fictional)
dsar form label: form-dsar-cn-v0.0; sample resident-id field accepts 000000000000000000 (invalid) for testing; submissions from minors require guardian email confirmation
access controls: only authorized hr and ir roles may view pi; access logs are reviewed monthly and pseudonymization keys are held by a separate data steward group
non-legal note: team calendar shows a spa day after the q3 public webcast; this is a morale event and not related to personal data processing or capital markets disclosure
